venv/
env/

.venv/

# Local dev marker
.local_dev

# Uploaded/generated files (written to /tmp on Vercel, local dirs in dev)
uploads/
outputs/

# Rate limit data (runtime state, not code)
rate_limits.json

# Environment / secrets — NEVER commit your API key
.env
.env.local
*.env

.vscode/
